title: HOG Electrical and Solar wins again – and welcomes new ownership!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - We are proud to announce...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are proud to announce that HOG Electrical and Solar has been voted Best Solar Company in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025 - the second year in a row! A heartfelt thank you to our loyal clients and the community for your continued trust and support.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - We are proud to announce that HOG Electrical and Solar has been voted Best Solar Company in the Best of Mossel Bay Readers' Choice Awards 2025 - the second year in a row! A heartfelt thank you to our loyal clients and the community for your continued trust and support."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Alongside this exciting achievement, we’re thrilled to share more big news: HOG Electrical and Solar has new ownership. Please join us in welcoming Cameron Izaakse, Quintin Human, and Rolene Jacobs as the new directors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"While ownership has changed, our mission remains unchanged: to continue serving Mossel Bay with the same dedication, competitive pricing, and outstanding after-sales service that has defined HOG for the past six years.","html":"While ownership has changed, our mission remains unchanged: to continue serving Mossel Bay with the same dedication, competitive pricing, and outstanding after-sales service that has defined HOG for the past six years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"These three dynamic and passionate leaders have been part of the HOG family since 2021.","html":"These three dynamic and passionate leaders have been part of the HOG family since 2021."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Now, as owners, they are committed to carrying the HOG name forward with pride and excellence. Here’s to a powerful future, fuelled by expertise, community, and clean energy!","html":"Now, as owners, they are committed to carrying the HOG name forward with pride and excellence. Here’s to a powerful future, fuelled by expertise, community, and clean energy!"},{"type":"list","items":["Cell: 061 536 9983","Email: [email protected]","https://www.facebook.com/hog.solar"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: HOG Electrical and Solar wins again – and welcomes new ownership!
